title: Purple Flow PvP
body:
# Purple themed PvP pack

This pack is purple themed + dark mode. I created this pack to expand my skills in the Resource Pack area. Please let me know if you have any further design suggestions for me and I will see if and how I can implement them.

## Changed Textures
- Items
- Blocks (emissive in newer game versions with Optifine or Continuity)
- GUI (more custom in newer game versions)
- HUD
- Buttons
- Menu Background
- Moon
